nasb.text: So Tamar went to her brother Amnon’s house, and he was lying down. And she took dough, kneaded it, made cakes in his sight, and baked the cakes.

esv.text: So Tamar went to her brother Amnon’s house, where he was lying down. And she took dough and kneaded it and made cakes in his sight and baked the cakes.

cnv.text: 他瑪就到她哥哥暗嫩的屋裡去；暗嫩正躺著。他瑪取了點麵，把麵和好，就在暗嫩面前做餅，並且把餅烤熟了。

ccb.text: 她玛到了哥哥暗嫩的家，暗嫩正躺在床上装病。她拿了面团在他面前揉面做饼，把饼烤熟了。
